name: Navient Corporation
description: Navient Corporation is an American financial services company headquartered in Wilmington, Delaware. Formed in 2014 following the split of Sallie Mae, the company specializes in providing technology-enabled education finance and business processing solutions. Navient focuses on simplifying complex financial programs, offering asset management, business processing, and customer support services to help clients and millions of individuals achieve their financial goals. The company is publicly traded on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol NAVI and continues to evolve its service offerings within the financial technology and education sectors.
